name_en: Top-tier original leather M15157 Avocado Green Small Capucines series is named after the Paris street where Louis Vuitton opened its first store in 1854. This Capucines mini bag features a woven leather handle, tassel decoration, and a lock, highlighting the iconic elements of the Crafty series. The LV monogram features a jacquard effect, cleverly showcasing the brand's exquisite craftsmanship. Dimensions: 17.3 × 9 × 27 cm
